'''âr-sh-ng''' ('''karashang''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quiesce|quiesce]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-sh-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quiesce|quiesce]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âr-sh-ng
|-
! Lemma
| karashang
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thirashang|thirashang]] || [[word:jirashang|jirashang]] || [[word:shirashang|shirashang]] || [[word:kirashang|kirashang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthurashang|thuthurashang]] || [[word:jujurashang|jujurashang]] || [[word:shushurashang|shushurashang]] || [[word:kukurashang|kukurashang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thurashang|thurashang]] || [[word:jurashang|jurashang]] || [[word:shurashang|shurashang]] || [[word:kurashang|kurashang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thurashang|thurashang]] || [[word:jurashang|jurashang]] || [[word:shurashang|shurashang]] || [[word:kurashang|kurashang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:therashang|therashang]] || [[word:jerashang|jerashang]] || [[word:sherashang|sherashang]] || [[word:kerashang|kerashang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothorashang|thothorashang]] || [[word:jojorashang|jojorashang]] || [[word:shoshorashang|shoshorashang]] || [[word:kokorashang|kokorashang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thorashang|thorashang]] || [[word:jorashang|jorashang]] || [[word:shorashang|shorashang]] || [[word:korashang|korashang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thorashang|thorashang]] || [[word:jorashang|jorashang]] || [[word:shorashang|shorashang]] || [[word:korashang|korashang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠrashang|thĂŠrashang]] || [[word:jĂŠrashang|jĂŠrashang]] || [[word:shĂŠrashang|shĂŠrashang]] || [[word:kĂŠrashang|kĂŠrashang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thatharashang|thatharashang]] || [[word:jajarashang|jajarashang]] || [[word:shasharashang|shasharashang]] || [[word:kakarashang|kakarashang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tharashang|tharashang]] || [[word:jarashang|jarashang]] || [[word:sharashang|sharashang]] || [[word:karashang|karashang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tharashang|tharashang]] || [[word:jarashang|jarashang]] || [[word:sharashang|sharashang]] || [[word:karashang|karashang]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:sharashang|sharashang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gosharashang|gosharashang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokisharashang|gokisharashang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:sharashangnĂŒ|sharashangnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gosharashangnknĂŒ|gosharashangnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokisharashangnĂŒ|gokisharashangnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sharashangshĂ«|sharashangshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosharashangnkshĂ«|gosharashangnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisharashangshĂ«|gokisharashangshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharashangro|sharashangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharashangnkro|gosharashangnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharashangro|gokisharashangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sharashangmu|sharashangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharashangnkmu|gosharashangnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharashangmu|gokisharashangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:sharashangsher|sharashangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gosharashangnksher|gosharashangnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokisharashangsher|gokisharashangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:sharashang|sharashang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gosharashangnkng|gosharashangnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokisharashang|gokisharashang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:sharashangya|sharashangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gosharashangnkya|gosharashangnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokisharashangya|gokisharashangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:sharashangyam|sharashangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gosharashangnkyam|gosharashangnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokisharashangyam|gokisharashangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharashangnĂŒshĂ«|sharashangnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharashangnknĂŒshĂ«|gosharashangnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharashangnĂŒshĂ«|gokisharashangnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharashangnĂŒro|sharashangnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharashangnknĂŒro|gosharashangnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharashangnĂŒro|gokisharashangnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharashangnĂŒmu|sharashangnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharashangnknĂŒmu|gosharashangnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharashangnĂŒmu|gokisharashangnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharashangshĂ«nĂŒ|sharashangshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharashangnkshĂ«nĂŒ|gosharashangnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharashangshĂ«nĂŒ|gokisharashangshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharashangshĂ«ro|sharashangshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharashangnkshĂ«ro|gosharashangnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharashangshĂ«ro|gokisharashangshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharashangshĂ«mu|sharashangshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharashangnkshĂ«mu|gosharashangnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharashangshĂ«mu|gokisharashangshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharashangronĂŒ|sharashangronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharashangnkronĂŒ|gosharashangnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharashangronĂŒ|gokisharashangronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharashangroshĂ«|sharashangroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharashangnkroshĂ«|gosharashangnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharashangroshĂ«|gokisharashangroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharashangromu|sharashangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharashangnkromu|gosharashangnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharashangromu|gokisharashangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharashangmunĂŒ|sharashangmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharashangnkmunĂŒ|gosharashangnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharashangmunĂŒ|gokisharashangmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharashangmushĂ«|sharashangmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharashangnkmushĂ«|gosharashangnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharashangmushĂ«|gokisharashangmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharashangmuro|sharashangmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharashangnkmuro|gosharashangnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharashangmuro|gokisharashangmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
